advert.description: The Maltesers product packaging and tagline "Look on the light side" are visible in the final frames before the channel transition/next ad.
The Heinz logo and slogan "BEANZ MEANZ HEINZ" appear prominently. The ad concludes with text overlays before transitioning to the next commercial.
The Butlins Big Weekenders logo and text appear over footage of a nightclub event, fading out just before the next animated commercial starts.
Animated graphics illustrating fast property sales conclude with contact information and the promise of "7 DAYS" sale.
The "Hands Free Slip-ins" promotional text is displayed alongside Jamie Redknapp demonstrating the shoes. The ad ends with a static shot of the shoe before the next spot begins.
The Voltarol product tube and box are shown during the narrative of a cyclist. The Haleon brand logo (owner) appears in the final seconds before the next ad intro.
The Ideal Home Show promotional graphic featuring celebrity hosts remains on screen as the closing frame of this advertisement block.
The Age UK Play lottery banner and call-to-action overlay remain on screen throughout the ad, concluding just as a new commercial spot about fitness/energy drinks begins at 05:15.
